message:
feat(agent-detection): Build agent auto-detection module

Implements meta_skill-ql37: Build agent auto-detection module

- Add AgentType enum for 9 supported AI coding agents:
  - Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Cline
  - OpenCode, Aider, Windsurf, Continue
- Create DetectedAgent type with version, config path, binary path
- Add IntegrationStatus enum (NotConfigured, PartiallyConfigured, etc.)
- Add DetectionMethod enum (ConfigFile, Binary, VscodeExtension, etc.)
- Implement AgentDetector trait with detect(), get_config_path()
- Create detector implementations for all 9 agents
- Build AgentDetectionService orchestrator with:
  - detect_all() - scan for all agents
  - detect_by_type() - find specific agent
  - summary() - get detection statistics
- Add 28 unit tests and 12 integration tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
